title: Pouteria velutina
taxonomy: Pouteria velutina is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Pouteria velutina belongs to the genus Pouteria, which is a group of tropical trees and shrubs. The Sapotaceae family consists of over 800 species of trees and shrubs, commonly known as sapotes or satinwoods. Pouteria velutina is an important part of its native ecosystem, providing food and habitat for various wildlife species.
